productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Striped Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and white striped shirt made of 60% polyester and 40% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with double button cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest, a full buttoned placket and a curved hem Fit indigo nation Edgy Fit Wash care Hand wash or machine wash cold below 30 degrees using a mild detergent Flat dry in shade Do not wring or bleach Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with chinos or trousers and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
